steps.title: Identify similar triangles
steps.content: The marked angles at $W$ and $Y$ are equal, and the angles at $Q$ are vertical angles. Therefore, triangles $WXQ$ and $YZQ$ are similar by angle-angle similarity.

steps.title: Set up corresponding sides
steps.content:
Match corresponding sides from the similar triangles.
$$\frac{WQ}{YQ}=\frac{WX}{YZ}$$
Substitute the given lengths.
$$\frac{70}{21}=\frac{60}{YZ}$$
